mechanics.excerpt: In tact, most MechWarriors avold any drink that you have to swallow quickly before your mouth goes numb: Four shots of grain alcohol poured Into brandy snifter are the drinks basic element: Each variant of the PPC is named for a Great House , depending on what is used to dilute the grain alcohol. Steiner cuts with two shots peppermint schnapps_ Marik uses two shots of Ouzo, and Davion either two shots 0f bourbon 0r, in the Capellan March, tequila: The Liao variant cuts the drink with double shot of plum wine, the Kurita version with sake.
